endpoints.name: Lists all of the available operations.
endpoints.description: Lists all the available operations provided by Service Fabric SeaBreeze resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Gets all the application resources in a given subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all application resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all the gateway resources in a given subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all gateway resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the gateway.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.description: Gets the information about all network resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the network.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all the secret resources in a given subscription.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all secret resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the secret.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.description: Gets the information about all volume resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the volume.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: Gets all the application resources in a given resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all application resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the Application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the application resource with the given name.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the application resource with the given name. The information include the description and other properties of the application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates an application resource.
endpoints.description: Creates an application resource with the specified name, description and properties. If an application resource with the same name exists, then it is updated with the specified description and properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the application resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the application resource identified by the name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Lists all the service resources.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all services of an application resource. The information include the description and other properties of the Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the service resource with the given name.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the service resource with the given name. The information include the description and other properties of the service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SERVICERESOURCENAME}} with a real serviceresourcename.

endpoints.name: Gets replicas of a given service.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all replicas of a given service of an application. The information includes the runtime properties of the replica instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SERVICERESOURCENAME}} with a real serviceresourcename.

endpoints.name: Gets the given replica of the service of an application.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the service replica with the given name. The information include the description and other properties of the service replica.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SERVICERESOURCENAME}} with a real serviceresourcename.

endpoints.name: Gets the logs from the container.
endpoints.description: Gets the logs for the container of the specified code package of the service replica.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APPLICATIONRESOURCENAME}} with a real applicationresourcename. Replace {{REPLICANAME}} with a real replicaname. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CODEPACKAGENAME}} with a real codepackagename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SERVICERESOURCENAME}} with a real serviceresourcename.

endpoints.name: Gets all the gateway resources in a given resource group.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about all gateway resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the Gateway.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the gateway resource with the given name.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the gateway resource with the given name. The information include the description and other properties of the gateway.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{GATEWAYRESOURCENAME}} with a real gatewayresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a gateway resource.
endpoints.description: Creates a gateway resource with the specified name, description and properties. If a gateway resource with the same name exists, then it is updated with the specified description and properties. Use gateway resources to create a gateway for public connectivity for services within your application.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{GATEWAYRESOURCENAME}} with a real gatewayresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the gateway resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the gateway resource identified by the name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{GATEWAYRESOURCENAME}} with a real gatewayresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a network resource.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{NETWORKRESOURCENAME}} with a real networkresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.description: Gets the information about all secret resources in a given resource group. The information include the description and other properties of the Secret.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the secret resource with the given name.
endpoints.description: Gets the information about the secret resource with the given name. The information include the description and other properties of the secret.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Creates or updates a secret resource.
endpoints.description: Creates a secret resource with the specified name, description and properties. If a secret resource with the same name exists, then it is updated with the specified description and properties.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Deletes the secret resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the secret resource identified by the name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: List names of all values of the specified secret resource.
endpoints.description: Gets information about all secret value resources of the specified secret resource. The information includes the names of the secret value resources, but not the actual values.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Gets the specified secret value resource.
endpoints.description: Get the information about the specified named secret value resources. The information does not include the actual value of the secret.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SECRETVALUERESOURCENAME}} with a real secretvalueresourcename.

endpoints.name: Adds the specified value as a new version of the specified secret resource.
endpoints.description: Creates a new value of the specified secret resource. The name of the value is typically the version identifier. Once created the value cannot be changed.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SECRETVALUERESOURCENAME}} with a real secretvalueresourcename.

endpoints.name: Deletes the specified  value of the named secret resource.
endpoints.description: Deletes the secret value resource identified by the name. The name of the resource is typically the version associated with that value. Deletion will fail if the specified value is in use.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SECRETVALUERESOURCENAME}} with a real secretvalueresourcename.

endpoints.name: Lists the specified value of the secret resource.
endpoints.description: Lists the decrypted value of the specified named value of the secret resource. This is a privileged operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SECRETRESOURCENAME}} with a real secretresourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{SECRETVALUERESOURCENAME}} with a real secretvalueresourcename.
